name: academorix/domains
purpose: Custom-domain substrate — Domain aggregate per Tenant, DomainRecord expected-DNS diff, and pluggable DomainVerifier + CertificateProvisioner bindings.
capabilities: Domain aggregate (dom_...) — subdomain / custom / alias kinds
DomainRecord expected DNS diff against real DNS
10 lifecycle events: domain, record, and cert
when_to_use: Letting a tenant point their vanity domain (gym.example.com) at their Academorix workspace with TLS + verification.
when_not_to_use: For platform-owned subdomain resolution, the sibling academorix/tenancy package handles it directly.
